creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text: It would be helpful to test the resource limit on open files EARLY in the build so you don't have to suffer through a LONG poudriere build of qt5-webengine, only to fail near the end.  Whether the build _really_ needs 4096 descriptors or the poudriere [current] default of 1024 (or some other value) would suffice, checking the minimum resource limit early would be a fairly simple addition to the port.
